title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed, focusing on mathematical foundations rather than tools, builds resilient skills that survive hype cycles. He contends that learning fundamentals slowly is more valuable than chasing the latest AI tools.
